findings.text: No source materials or artifacts provided; cannot locate Notice to Quit records.

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search the matter for any existing Notice to Quit records or related correspondence. If none found, request human operator to upload relevant source documents (e.g., NTQ forms, emails, letters) to the matter evidence store.
proposed_tasks.title: Request human upload of Notice to Quit source documents

summary: No source materials or artifacts were provided in this work order. The task to locate and upload Notice to Quit records cannot be completed without evidence. A follow-up task is proposed to request human operator to upload relevant documents.

uncertainties.description: No source materials or artifacts available to locate Notice to Quit records.
